### PL-STR-03: str.repeat/center/replace_slice/lpad/rpad require literal integers or single-char literals — expressions rejected

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Project | polars |
| Category | String Operations |
| Root Cause | parameter_width |
| Affected Backends | polars |
| Status | Investigating |
| Workaround | Enhanced error message |
| Known Expr Limitations | polars base.py: repeat count, center length, center character, replace_slice start, replace_slice length, lpad characters, rpad characters |
| Xfail Refs | tests/cross_backend/argument_types/test_arg_types_string.py |
| Notes | Polars str.repeat/center/replace_slice require literal integers; center/lpad/rpad require a single literal fill character (multi-char string rejected). KEL keys: FK_STR.REPEAT (count), FK_STR.CENTER (length, character), FK_STR.REPLACE_SLICE (start, length), FK_STR.LPAD (characters), FK_STR.RPAD (characters). |
| Last Verified | 2026-05-11 |

| Root Cause | upstream_feature_gap |
| Affected Backends | narwhals-polars, narwhals-pandas |
| Status | Investigating |
| Workaround | Strict xfail |
| Xfail Refs | tests/nested/test_list_operations.py, tests/cross_backend/argument_types/test_arg_types_list.py |
| Notes | Narwhals v2.21 list namespace has only: len, unique, contains, get, min, max, mean, median, sum, sort. All other list ops raise BackendCapabilityError. Polars backend also has xfails for expression handling issues in test_arg_types_list.py. |
| Last Verified | 2026-05-11 |

## Cast Semantics

### IB-CAST-01: DuckDB uses banker's rounding (round-half-to-even) for float-to-int cast, not truncation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Project | ibis |
| Category | Cast Semantics |
| Root Cause | by_design |
| Affected Backends | ibis-duckdb |
| Status | By Design |
| Workaround | Accepted (documented) |
| Xfail Refs | tests/cross_backend/test_cast.py:32, tests/cross_backend/test_cast.py:225, tests/cross_backend/test_compose_cast.py:50 |
| Notes | DuckDB engine decision. IEEE 754 rounding vs Python truncation. Permanent divergence. |
| Last Verified | 2026-05-11 |

## Recursive CTEs

### IB-CTE-01: Ibis strips RECURSIVE keyword from generated CTE SQL — WITH RECURSIVE becomes WITH

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Project | ibis |
| Category | Recursive CTEs |
| Root Cause | upstream_bug |
| Affected Backends | ibis-duckdb, ibis-polars, ibis-sqlite |
| Status | Open |
| Workaround | None |
| Upstream Issue | https://github.com/ibis-project/ibis/issues/11949 |
| Notes | Blocks future recursive relations work. SQLGlot fully supports recursive CTEs — bug is in Ibis CTE generation layer. |
| Last Verified | 2026-05-11 |
